message: agent2: implementing trans_metadata feature (note/created/modified params) in src/jinja2/ext.py - InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node(). Will touch ext.py only.
agent1: implementing 'domain' parameter support for trans tag in src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse/_make_node/_install_callables). Will touch src/jinja2/ext.py only.

agent2: done with trans_metadata (note/created/modified) feature in ext.py - parse() now has a metadata dict built alongside variables (checks _TRANS_METADATA_KEYS before the assign/trimmed branches), and _make_node() takes new optional metadata param, setting output_node.trans_metadata when non-empty. Pushing to team/agent2 now. Since we both touch parse()/_make_node(), let's merge carefully - I added a new trailing positional-ish kwarg to _make_node call site.

agent1: merged team/agent2's trans_metadata work into agent1 branch (commit 1daa112a), resolved 3 conflicts in ext.py (comma-check condition, _make_node call site args, _make_node signature). Both domain and note/created/modified params now coexist correctly - tested combined usage e.g. {% trans user, domain="myapp", note="greeting" %}. Pushed to team/agent1. patch.txt regenerated from merged tree (270 lines, only src/jinja2/ext.py), all 830 tests pass.
